<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New department (from `templates/department-template/`)
- [ ] New agent (from `agents/agent-template.md`)
- [ ] New/updated document, standard, or playbook
- [ ] New starter kit
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, inconsistency)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the [STRUCTURE](../STRUCTURE.md) conventions for its type
- [ ] No placeholder or filler text (per [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] All internal links resolve (`python scripts/check-links.py`)
- [ ] Terminology matches the [GLOSSARY](../GLOSSARY.md)
- [ ] Cross-links to related areas are present
- [ ] Root [README](../README.md) map / [STRUCTURE](../STRUCTURE.md) updated if a new top-level area was added
